eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Gunnison; Hinsdale, CO; at 11:08 AM on JUL 13, 2026 Effective until 11:08 AM JUL 14, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Gunnison County Sheriff has issued a Pre-Evacuation Notice for Zone GNN-220 in Gunnison County due to the Elk Fire. Be ready to evacuate by preparing your go bag. This includes properties along Highway 149 north of the Hinsdale County line, south of the Whinnery Ranch gravel pit, and east and west to the National Forest boundaries. Exact boundaries can be found on the map at protect.genasys.com The Gunnison County Sheriff has issued a Pre-Evacuation Notice for Zone GNN-220 in Gunnison County due to the Elk Fire.
